slides.headline: 11 missed calls this week.
slides.body: That's a holiday I funded — for the plumber down the road. Swipe.

slides.headline: Hi. I'm your missed call. We've never spoken. That's the point.
8:04am — boiler quote.
slides.body: You were driving. He wasn't. First job of my week.

slides.headline: 1pm — 'just ringing round'.
slides.body: Three trades on her list. First to answer won. Not you.

slides.label: Friday, 9:42pm. Burst pipe. You were asleep — fair enough.

slides.headline: I don't leave voicemails. Nobody rings back. I just… move on.
I'm only afraid of one thing.
slides.body: Someone who always picks up. Day, night, mid-ladder. Every single time.

slides.headline: Find out what I've cost you
slides.body: Free 60-second missed-call audit — link in bio.
slides.save: Save this — then send it to a mate who never answers
